headers.value: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://mempool.space https://api.binance.com https://api.exchange.coinbase.com wss://stream.binance.com:9443 wss://ws-feed.exchange.coinbase.com; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com; font-src 'self'; frame-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
